---
title: "Analysis Part 3:"
subtitle: "Validation Analysis"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
author: "David Izydorczyk"
format: 
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-copy: true
    code-tools: true
    df-print: kable
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
    fig-height: 4
    fig-width:  9
    fig-cap-location: top
    tab-cap-location: top
    embed-resources: true
    grid:
      margin-width: 350px
execute:
  warning: false
  messages: false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup}
#| code-summary: "Load packages & ggplot theme"
#| cache: false

# Packages
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(psych)
library(parameters)


source("../Scripts/plot_settings.R")
source("../Scripts/helper_functions.R")
```

```{r data}
#| code-summary: "Load data"

# Load data sets
est <- read_csv("../Data/estimation_data.csv")

# Load MDS cues
mds_food      <- read_csv2("../Results/MDS_config_food.csv")      |> add_column(ID_item = 1:80)
mds_countries <- read_csv2("../Results/MDS_config_countries.csv") |> add_column(ID_item = 1:80)
mds_mammals   <- read_csv2("../Results/MDS_config_mammals.csv")   |> add_column(ID_item = 1:80)


# Merge est and mds
df_food      <- est |> 
                  filter(domain == "Food") |> 
                  left_join(mds_food,by="ID_item") 

df_countries <- est |> 
                  filter(domain == "Countries") |> 
                  left_join(mds_countries,by="ID_item") 

df_mammals   <- est |> 
                  filter(domain == "Mammals") |> 
                  left_join(mds_mammals,by="ID_item")


# Combine into tibble
dfs <- tibble(names   = c("Food", "Countries", "Mammals"),
              dataset = list(df_food,df_countries,df_mammals))

```


```{r}
#| code-summary: "Regression: True crit ~ MDS Cues"

compute_reg_true <- function(dataset){
  
  temp <- dataset |> 
          select(ID_item,crit,starts_with("V")) |> 
          distinct() 

  lm(crit ~ . -ID_item, data = temp) |> 
    model_parameters(include_info=T)
  
}


dfs <- dfs |> mutate(reg_true = map(dataset,compute_reg_true))

dfs$reg_true

```




```{r}
#| code-summary: "Regression: Est crit ~ MDS Cues"
#| label: tbl-adjr2
#| tbl-cap: "Adjusted R² per per Person"

# Compute adjusted R² oer person
compute_reg_est <- function(dataset){
  
  temp   <- dataset |> 
              select(ID,ID_item,est,starts_with("V")) |> 
              distinct()
  
  IDs    <- temp$ID |> unique()
  adj_r2 <- vector("numeric",length = length(IDs))
  
  for(i in 1:length(IDs)){
    
    mod <- lm(est ~ ., data = temp |> filter(ID == IDs[i]) |> select(-ID,-ID_item))
    
    adj_r2[i] <- summary(mod)$adj.r.squared
    
  }
  
  return(adj_r2)
  
}

dfs <- dfs |> mutate(reg_est = map(dataset,compute_reg_est))

# Compute descriptives per domain
dfs |> 
  transmute(names, adj_r2 = map(reg_est, ~ .x |> describe() |> as_tibble()))  |> 
  unnest(adj_r2) |>
  select(names, mean, sd, min, max) |>
  kable(col.names = c("Domain", "M", "SD","Min","Max"), align = "c", digits = 2) |> 
    kable_paper(c("hover"))
```



```{r}
#| code-summary: "Plot distribution of adjusted R²s"
#| label: fig-adjR2
#| fig-cap: "Distribution of adjusted R²s"
#| fig-height: 6
#| fig-width:  15
#| column: page


adjR2_plot <- function(reg_est,names){
  
 ggplot(data.frame(reg_est), aes(x = reg_est)) +
    geom_histogram(bins=20, color = "black", fill = clrs[2]) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, by=0.25),labels=dropLeading0) +
    theme_nice() + 
    labs(title = names,
         y     = ifelse(names == "Food","Frequency",""),
         x     = ifelse(names == "Countries","Adjusted R²",""))

}


dfs|> 
  mutate(adjR2_plot = pmap(list(reg_est,names),adjR2_plot)) |> 
  pull(adjR2_plot) |> 
  wrap_plots()


ggsave("../Figures/distr_adjR2.pdf", width = 30 , height = 10 , unit = "cm",
       bg="white",dpi=300,device = cairo_pdf)
```
